subject: We received your mentor application
html:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for applying to become a mentor on OpenMentor — helping others grow is a wonderful thing, and we're glad you want to be part of it.

We've received your application and will review it shortly. Because of the volume of new applications this can take a few days, but we'll email you as soon as we're done.

If you haven't heard from us within two weeks, drop us a line at hello@openmentor.io — something may have gone astray.

Talk soon,
The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
